sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93758" key="*seutlai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Σευτλαῖος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σεῦτλον</etym>) <title_ TEIform="title">Beety</title_>, name of a frog in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:209" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">209</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
